# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: myapp-web
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp-web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: myapp-web
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: myapp-web
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: myapp-cache
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp-cache
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: myapp-cache
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: cache
        image: myapp-cache
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: myapp-workers
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp-workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: myapp-workers
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: workers
        image: myapp-workers
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached
spec:
  selector:
    app: myapp-cache
  ports:
  - port: 11211
